headline: Assessing Cummins (CMI) Valuation After Strong Long Term Shareholder Returns
summary: Why Cummins (CMI) is on investors’ radar Cummins (CMI) recently caught attention with its current share price around $538 and a one year total return of about 74%, prompting closer scrutiny of how the business and its valuation line up. See our latest analysis for Cummins. Recent trading has been choppy, with a 1 day share price return of 5.14% but a 30 day share price return of 7.85% decline. At the same time, the 1 year total shareholder return of 73.78% and 3 year total shareholder return...
